---
title: "nomnoml"
---

Node-edge and UML diagrams from terse text. A pipeline (@fig-pipe), a
state machine (@fig-states), and a class diagram (@fig-classes) — each a
handful of lines. Click to zoom.

![Rendering pipeline](figures/pipeline.noml){#fig-pipe}

[view source: `pipeline.noml`](https://github.com/seandavi/quarto-livefigures/blob/main/examples/gallery/figures/pipeline.noml){.source-link}

![Render lifecycle](figures/states.noml){#fig-states}

[view source: `states.noml`](https://github.com/seandavi/quarto-livefigures/blob/main/examples/gallery/figures/states.noml){.source-link}

![Filter/backend/cache structure](figures/classes.noml){#fig-classes}

[view source: `classes.noml`](https://github.com/seandavi/quarto-livefigures/blob/main/examples/gallery/figures/classes.noml){.source-link}
